mapper.text:
Hi {{get(split(1.Name; space); 1)}},

thank you again for applying for the {{1.Position}} position. Although your background and skills are impressive, we decided not to invite you to the job interview. However, we would like to stay in touch and inform you about new job openings and other exciting news.

Talk soon,

Integromat
mapper.subject: Bad News; And Good News
